title: Teledyne e2v HiRel Releases Catalog Radiation Tolerant 30 GHz SPDT RF Switch for Space Applications
text: MILPITAS, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #teledynee2vhirel--Teledyne e2v HiRel Releases Catalog Radiation Tolerant 30 GHz SPDT RF Switch for Space Applications

title: Teledyne e2v HiRel Announces 13.9 GHz Plug & Play Frequency Synthesizer Module for LEO Space Applications
text: MILPITAS, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #teledynee2vhirel--Teledyne e2v HiRel announces 13.9 GHz Plug & Play Synthesizer Module for LEO Applications

title: Teledyne e2v HiRel Electronics Technology Partner Integra Technologies Begins Production Shipments of Industry First 100 V RF GaN
text: EL SEGUNDO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #teledynee2vhirel--Teledyne e2v HiRel Electronics Technology Partner Integra Technologies begins production shipments of industry first 100 V RF GaN.

title: Teledyne (TDY) Nears Delivery of 127 PackBot Robots to Germany
text: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) is expected to complete the delivery of 127 PackBot 525 unmanned ground vehicles to the German Army by July 2022.

title: Teledyne's (TDY) FLIR Unveils New Modular Robot Kobra 725
text: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) unveils the launch of its Kobra 725 modular robot, which is an enhanced and technologically advanced version of the Kobra 710 unmanned ground system.

title: Teledyne to Present at the Cowen Sustainability & Energy Transition Summit
text: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) today announced that Jason VanWees, Vice Chairman, will present virtually at Cowen's 2nd Annual Sustainability & Energy Transition Summit on Wednesday, June 8, at 11:50 a.m. Eastern. A live webcast of Teledyne's conference presentation may be accessed via the company's website at www.teledyne.com/investors/events-and-presentations. A replay of the webcast also will be available on this website. In addition
